headline: International Paper Streamlines Operations Through Facility Closures
summary: IP plans to close multiple facilities by Q3 2026 as it streamlines operations to improve costs, expand capacity and serve customers.

headline: Methanex to Indefinitely Idle Titan Plant as Gas Supply Contract Fails
summary: MEOH will indefinitely idle its Titan methanol plant in Trinidad after failing to secure a new gas contract, while preserving restart optionality.

raw.headline: Methanex to Indefinitely Idle Titan Plant as Gas Supply Contract Fails
raw.summary: MEOH will indefinitely idle its Titan methanol plant in Trinidad after failing to secure a new gas contract, while preserving restart optionality.

headline: ATI Shares Surge 72% YTD: Can the Stock Continue Its Momentum?
summary: ATI's 72% YTD rally is fueled by aerospace, defense and specialty energy demand, capacity investments, earnings beats and a stronger growth outlook.

raw.headline: ATI Shares Surge 72% YTD: Can the Stock Continue Its Momentum?
